message:
e2e: Fix auth secret mismatch in CI

The .env.example had a placeholder secret that didn't match the
hardcoded test secret in packages/e2e/utils/sign-cookie.ts. When CI
copies .env.example to .env, the mismatched secrets caused cookie
signature validation to fail.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/5336f8b5-8a9c-4f0e-a777-c1d691cf2e6d

files.patch:
@@ -5,7 +5,8 @@ GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET=your_github_client_secret
 
 # BetterAuth secret for session encryption
 # Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32
-BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=your_better_auth_secret
+# For local dev and CI e2e tests - must match packages/e2e/utils/sign-cookie.ts
+BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=IPTC+aAEkEWhGW4xsgDtt+qaOnK0gpGBelQhKPcchuw=
 
 WEB_URL=http://localhost:3000
